news.paragraph: Adobe is seeing renewed interest from prominent investors like Michael Burry, who is reportedly backing the stock despite recent analyst downgrades. Some market commentary also highlights the company as a potential long-term value play. No immediate catalysts such as earnings or regulatory decisions are noted in the current headlines.
